title: Operations planning
summary: 9609 A Level — capacity, scheduling, and aligning ops with demand.
learningObjectives: Link sales forecasts to production plans.
Evaluate planning tools such as Gantt charts.

simpleExplanation.title: Matching supply to demand
simpleExplanation.summary: Operations planning schedules resources to meet forecast demand while controlling cost and service levels.

sections.content: **Operations planning** (9.3.5) completes **Topic 9**. Integrate **8.1.3 forecasts** and **4.3.1 capacity**.
